# Working Principles Template

## Purpose

Use this template to record durable principles that guide work across humans, repositories, and AI sessions.

## Template Body

```md
# Working Principles

## Principles

### <Principle Name>

Describe the principle.

## Rules

- <Rule>
- Public contract changes follow `contract-impact.md`.
- Repository tree defines ownership; contract graph defines impact.

## Related Documents

- [<Document title>](<relative-link>)
```
